language.name: English

string.id: %@ needs to be in your Applications folder for best experience. Move it now?

language.string: %@ needs to be in your Applications folder for best experience. Move it now?

string.id: All fans automatically return to Auto mode when the app quits, restarts, or crashes \u2014 a watchdog process enforces this.

language.string: All fans automatically return to Auto mode when the app quits, restarts, or crashes \u2014 a watchdog process enforces this.

string.id: Background helper, launch behavior, and display preferences

language.string: Background helper, launch behavior, and display preferences

string.id: By using MacFansControl you acknowledge that you accept full responsibility for any consequences resulting from adjusting fan speeds on your Mac.

language.string: By using MacFansControl you acknowledge that you accept full responsibility for any consequences resulting from adjusting fan speeds on your Mac.

string.id: Check the update feed in the background on a regular interval.

language.string: Check the update feed in the background on a regular interval.

string.id: Choose what the menu bar title shows and in what order

language.string: Choose what the menu bar title shows and in what order

string.id: Display a Dock icon in addition to the menu bar. Takes effect immediately.

language.string: Display a Dock icon in addition to the menu bar. Takes effect immediately.

string.id: Display temperatures in Celsius or Fahrenheit.

language.string: Display temperatures in Celsius or Fahrenheit.

string.id: Download updates silently and prompt when ready to install.

language.string: Download updates silently and prompt when ready to install.

string.id: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the background helper from the General tab to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

language.string: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the background helper from the General tab to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

string.id: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the helper to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

language.string: Fan changes will prompt for your password every few minutes. Install the helper to authorize once and never see the prompt again.

string.id: Fan control works without password prompts. The privileged helper authorizes SMC writes on your behalf.

language.string: Fan control works without password prompts. The privileged helper authorizes SMC writes on your behalf.

string.id: Fan settings are automatically re-applied after your Mac wakes from sleep to prevent stale states.

language.string: Fan settings are automatically re-applied after your Mac wakes from sleep to prevent stale states.

string.id: Fan speed sliders are bounded by the hardware-reported minimum and maximum RPM values. You cannot set a fan below or above what the SMC allows.

language.string: Fan speed sliders are bounded by the hardware-reported minimum and maximum RPM values. You cannot set a fan below or above what the SMC allows.

string.id: Live temperature readout across all subsystems

language.string: Live temperature readout across all subsystems

string.id: Low temp must be less than high temp

language.string: Low temp must be less than high temp

string.id: MacFansControl is open source. Star the repository, file issues, and follow development.

language.string: MacFansControl is open source. Star the repository, file issues, and follow development.

string.id: Managed in macOS System Settings. Select your preferred language for MacFansControl in Language & Region.

language.string: Managed in macOS System Settings. Select your preferred language for MacFansControl in Language & Region.

string.id: Manually overriding fan speeds can prevent your Mac from cooling properly. Sustained high temperatures may damage the CPU, GPU, SSD, or battery.

language.string: Manually overriding fan speeds can prevent your Mac from cooling properly. Sustained high temperatures may damage the CPU, GPU, SSD, or battery.

string.id: No fans detected on this hardware.

language.string: No fans detected on this hardware.

string.id: No favorites yet. Add sensors from the Sensors tab.

language.string: No favorites yet. Add sensors from the Sensors tab.

string.id: No presets yet. Save your current fan configuration to get started.

language.string: No presets yet. Save your current fan configuration to get started.

string.id: Only change fan settings if you understand your Mac's thermal requirements. If in doubt, leave fans in Auto mode.

language.string: Only change fan settings if you understand your Mac's thermal requirements. If in doubt, leave fans in Auto mode.

string.id: Open MacFansControl automatically when you sign in.

language.string: Open MacFansControl automatically when you sign in.

string.id: Open macOS Language and Region settings for MacFansControl

language.string: Open macOS Language and Region settings for MacFansControl

string.id: Opens System Settings where you can change the app language

language.string: Opens System Settings where you can change the app language

string.id: Please read before using fan control

language.string: Please read before using fan control

string.id: Saved fan configurations you can apply with one click

language.string: Saved fan configurations you can apply with one click

string.id: Setting fans too low under heavy load can cause thermal throttling, unexpected shutdowns, or permanent hardware damage.

language.string: Setting fans too low under heavy load can cause thermal throttling, unexpected shutdowns, or permanent hardware damage.

string.id: Shows a hand-picked subset of favorites in the order below. Toggle rows to add or remove.

language.string: Shows a hand-picked subset of favorites in the order below. Toggle rows to add or remove.

string.id: Shows a single metric — CPU average. Matches v1.0 behavior.

language.string: Shows a single metric — CPU average. Matches v1.0 behavior.

string.id: Shows every favorite, separated by '·'. Hidden and unavailable favorites are filtered out.

language.string: Shows every favorite, separated by '·'. Hidden and unavailable favorites are filtered out.

string.id: THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. THE AUTHORS AND CONTRIBUTORS ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES — INCLUDING DATA LOSS, HARDWARE DAMAGE, PROFIT LOSS, OR ANY OTHER LOSSES — ARISING FROM THE USE OR MISUSE OF THIS PROGRAM.

language.string: THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED "AS IS", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND. THE AUTHORS AND CONTRIBUTORS ARE NOT LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES — INCLUDING DATA LOSS, HARDWARE DAMAGE, PROFIT LOSS, OR ANY OTHER LOSSES — ARISING FROM THE USE OR MISUSE OF THIS PROGRAM.

string.id: Toggle temperature unit between Celsius and Fahrenheit

language.string: Toggle temperature unit between Celsius and Fahrenheit

string.id: drag to reorder · affects menu bar title

language.string: drag to reorder · affects menu bar title

string.id: exactly what the menu bar renders

language.string: exactly what the menu bar renders

string.id: use this software at your own risk

language.string: use this software at your own risk

string.id: what we do to protect you

language.string: what we do to protect you
